description_long: This is a freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural light wood finish, featuring three open horizontal shelves supported by two vertical side panels. The shelves are equipped with thin horizontal rails or lips at the front, likely to prevent items from falling off. The top of the unit has a raised edge, forming a shallow tray-like compartment. The back panel is solid, matching the rest of the structure, and the unit stands on two wide, flat feet for stability. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for displaying or storing books, magazines, or other items in public or semi-public urban spaces such as libraries, community centers, or waiting areas.
description: A light wood freestanding shelving unit with three open shelves, front rails, and a raised top edge. It is sturdy, functional, and designed for accessible storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves with front rails and a raised top edge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit and the solid side panel, with the tray-like top visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the back panel and shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the solid side and top tray.
